items.question: Which countries does Relocate2Day cover?
items.answer: We currently cover Spain, Gibraltar, Portugal, Italy, Malta, Bulgaria, Greece, Netherlands and Romania, with more countries coming soon.

items.question: Is Relocate2Day free to use?
items.answer: Yes — our core tools are free. We also offer a premium plan with deeper guides, tax calculators and expert support.

items.question: Can Relocate2Day help me with visa applications?
items.answer: We provide up-to-date guides on visa requirements and processes, but we are not a legal service. We recommend consulting a local immigration lawyer for your specific situation.

items.question: How accurate is the tax information?
items.answer: Our tax guides are regularly updated, but tax laws change frequently. Always verify with a local tax advisor before making financial decisions.
